title: linaria × sepium var. intermedia
intro: Linaria × sepium var. intermedia, also known as Toadflax or Purple Toadflax, is a perennial flowering plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Linaria × sepium var. intermedia include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and protect against free radical damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
